items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
A rivalry is brewing in real time 

Whenever Yaxel Lendeborg and the Warriors play Cameron Boozer and the Grizzlies, he’ll be circling that game on the calendar: “We’ll see him again in the regular season.”

media.title: Yaxel Lendeborg excited to circle Cameron Boozer rematch after Warriors' loss to Grizzlies
media.description: Cameron Boozer’s team again got the best of Yaxel Lendeborg’s in the Golden State Warriors’ loss to the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday at Cox Pavilion.
